news.headline: NFT activity on Telegram soared 400% in Q3 2024 per Helika's Web3 Gaming Report, with unique wallets rising from under 200K to over 1M.
news.summary: According to the Web3 Gaming Report by Helika, the amount of distinct wallets involved in the transfer of NFTs via Telegram saw a significant increase, rising from less than 200,000 in July to exceeding one million in September.

news.headline: Summary: 13 consumer news stories, including Gatorade's genAI bottles and Mars' freeze-dried candy; highlighting holiday toy trends.
news.summary: This week's consumer and retail highlights from PR Newswire feature innovative products like Gatorade's genAI squeeze bottles, Mars' new freeze-dried candy, and insights on the latest holiday toy trends. Released in New York on October 18, 2024, these announcements showcase cutting-edge advancements in the market. Stay updated with a plethora of press releases covering various industries and trends.

news.headline: BoJ is said to see little need to rush a rate hike in October.
BoJ is said to be likely to mull changing their view on upside price risks.
BoJ is said to be seeing prices in line with view, enabling a later hike.
Israel's Hayom: Sinwar's body may be used as a bargaining chip in the future - Al Jazeera
Can Saudi Arabia and Iran's relationship be evolving into a friendship despite their rivalry? #MideastConflict
Weekly recap of 14 press releases: ALDI's Thanksgiving deals, True Value's sale, and Sphere's new location. Thousands of press releases published each week.
news.summary: This week, significant press releases included ALDI's Thanksgiving promotions, True Value's sale announcement, and the upcoming opening of a new Sphere location. The news was released in New York on October 18, 2024, by PR Newswire. The large volume of press releases can make it challenging to stay informed on various developments.

news.headline: Doors & Windows market to reach $244.21 billion by 2029, as per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on October 18, 2024, a report on the doors and windows market was released. The report covers the global market for doors and windows, categorized by product (doors, windows), construction type (swinging, sliding, folding, revolving), material (wood, metal, plastic), end-use industries (residential, commercial, industrial), and region. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the industry's trends and forecasts for growth.

news.headline: LaNova Medicines begins Phase 1 trial of anti-PD-1/VEGF antibody with $42M financing. Strong preclinical results shown. IND submission in US second half.
news.summary: A Phase 1 clinical trial for LM-299, an anti-PD-1/VEGF BsAb, has been commenced in China for advanced solid tumors. This decision follows successful preclinical studies showing significant tumor growth inhibition and a favorable safety profile. Plans are underway to submit an Investigational New Drug (IND) application for LM-299 in the United States during the latter part of the year.

news.headline: Highland Electric Fleets awarded $10.9M by US DOE for V2G project to accelerate adoption. #CleanEnergy #EVs
news.summary: In Beverley, Massachusetts, on October 18, 2024, the Grid Deployment Office of the U.S. Department of Energy announced that the Scaling Vehicle-to-Grid Integration Nationally (SVIN) project has been chosen to receive around $10.9 million in cost-share funding. This funding aims to speed up the adoption of Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) technology nationwide.

news.headline: Greenbrier announces $0.30 dividend per share for Q4 2024. Payable on Nov 27, to stockholders as of Nov 6.
news.summary: Lake Oswego, Oregon - The Greenbrier Companies (NYSE: GBX) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share on October 18, 2024. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on November 27, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of November 6, 2024. Greenbrier, with its headquarters in Lake Oswego, is known for this announcement.

news.headline: Evergreen Theragnostics starts Phase II trial in the EU for small cell lung cancer with 68Ga-EVG321.
news.summary: In Springfield, New Jersey, on October 18, 2024, Evergreen Theragnostics, Inc., a company specializing in radiopharmaceuticals in the clinical stage, is introducing a new trial of 68Ga-EVG321 for individuals with small cell lung cancer. The company aims to expand treatment choices for cancer patients.

news.headline: SoundExchange partners with SCAPR to issue International Performer Numbers (IPN), enhancing global data efficiency in music industry.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, on October 18, 2024, SoundExchange and the Societies' Council for the Collective Management of Performers' Rights (SCAPR) revealed a unique agreement set to enhance data efficiency across the global digital music sector. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in streamlining operations within the industry. The partnership aims to revolutionize the management of performer rights by leveraging combined resources. SoundExchange's involvement in the venture signifies a strategic shift towards optimizing data processes. This initiative signifies a milestone in the industry's efforts to adapt to an increasingly digital landscape.

news.headline: Bybit boosts WSOT 2024 prize pool by $1 million, rewarding top trading squads. Register now! Dubai, UAE - Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 18, 2024, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, continues to show support for exceptional trading skills. By adding a total of 1,000,000 USDT, the exchange aims to reward the best-performing teams in the World Series of Trading (WSOT). This initiative highlights Bybit's commitment to recognizing and incentivizing excellence in the trading industry.

news.headline: Rep Newhouse to discuss tech advancements at Sila Moses Lake on Oct 18. Focus on battery tech, impact on supply chain, and workforce initiatives.
news.summary: Attend the upcoming town hall at Sila's Moses Lake manufacturing plant on October 18. The event will feature U.S. Rep. Dan Newhouse, community partners, and Sila employees. The focus will be on Moses Lake's growth as a hub for advanced battery technology, its impact on the U.S. battery supply chain, and local workforce development efforts. Sila's collaborations with Big Bend Community College and Columbia Basin Technical Skills Center will also be highlighted. This event underscores Sila's commitment to boosting the region's battery industry.

news.headline: Calibre Mining's Q3 gold production numbers announced; Q4 expected to be strongest in 2024; Valentine Gold Mine on track for Q2, 2025 production.
news.summary: Calibre Mining Corp. reported its operating results for Q3 and YTD as of September 30, 2024. The company, listed as TSX: CXB and OTCQX: CXBMF, released an update on the Valentine Gold Mine in Newfoundland & Labrador, Canada. They will conduct a conference call on October 18, 2024, at 10 am ET to discuss the Q3 results, revised full-year guidance, and Valentine update. All financial figures are in U.S. dollars.

news.headline: Chairman updates shareholders on progress towards SRx Health acquisition, creating global health leader for pets, people, families.
news.summary: The merger of the two companies will result in the creation of a prominent worldwide health and wellness company, offering improved products and solutions for pets, individuals, and households.

news.headline: The Power of Datafication handbook released at Frankfurter Buchmesse on Oct. 17, 2024, organized by Digital China.
news.summary: In Frankfurt, Germany on October 17, 2024, The Power of Datafication premiered at the prestigious Frankfurter Buchmesse global book fair, hosted by Digital China. The enlightening book, released by LID Publishing, presents a thorough worldwide perspective on the topic.

news.headline: Dogecoin surges after Elon Musk references "D.O.G.E." in a speech supporting Donald Trump, boosting price by X%.
news.summary: Today, the price of Dogecoin has surged following Elon Musk's mention of the cryptocurrency, referred to as "D.O.G.E." during a town hall event supporting Donald Trump. This mention by Musk has resulted in a noticeable increase in the value of Dogecoin, with the cryptocurrency experiencing a significant uptick in its price. This surge in value showcases the impact influential figures like Musk can have on the cryptocurrency market, highlighting the growing interest and influence in this digital asset.

news.headline: Memecoins surge by over 25% as market excitement continues on the rise.
news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached 4.8%, with a total of 8.4 million people currently unemployed. This marks a slight increase from the previous month. Additionally, the labor force participation rate stands at 62.7%. The report also indicates that the economy added 210,000 jobs in the past month, exceeding economist's expectations. These numbers reveal the ongoing challenges in the labor market as the country continues to recover from the impact of the pandemic.

news.headline: North Korean missile technical officers are in the frontlines supporting Russia's use of North Korean missiles - South Korea spy agency
North Korea has sent artillery shells, anti-tank rockets and ballistic missiles to Russia - South Korea spy agency
India's focus on boosting economy drives attention to financing boost: India Credit Forum.
news.summary: India's efforts to enhance its economy are driving attention towards a flourishing financing sector. This push has placed a spotlight on the significant growth in credit activities across the country.

news.headline: North Korean troops received Russian military uniforms, Russian arms, and fake Russian IDs — South Korea's spy agency
North Korean troops have been shipped to Russian bases in the far east for training and adjustment and will likely be subsequently deployed for combat - South Korea's spy agency
H&M Foundation commits SEK7,500,000 (€660,000) to support disaster risk financing program Start Ready in 8 countries.
news.summary: The H&M Foundation has pledged a substantial amount of SEK7,500,000 (approximately €660,000) to back Start Network's disaster risk financing program, Start Ready. This commitment spans three years and targets enhancing the readiness of eight countries to predict, address, and rebound from emergencies.

Investors can join the securities fraud investigation of Light & Wonder, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNW) by the SLF.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, in Los Angeles, it was reported that The Schall Law Firm, known for representing shareholders in legal matters, is currently examining allegations involving Light & Wonder, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNW). This investigation focuses on potential breaches of securities laws that may have affected investors of the Company.

news.headline: Some ECB governors wanted to drop the pledge of tight policy - Sources
Nxera Pharma will host R&D Day on 6 November 2024 at 16:30 JST virtually via Zoom webinar.
news.summary: Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. is scheduled to host an R&D Day on November 6, 2024, starting at 16:30 JST. The event will be conducted online through a Zoom webinar platform. To attend, individuals are required to pre-register by clicking on the provided link.

news.headline: European Medicines Agency recommends Novo Nordisk's Alhemo® for approval as once-daily treatment for haemophilia A/B with inhibitors. People aged 12+ eligible.
news.summary: In Bagsværd, Denmark, on October 18, 2024, Novo Nordisk revealed that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has given a favorable opinion proposing the endorsement of Alhemo® (concizumab). This medication is being recommended as the initial once-daily subcutaneous preventive treatment for individuals aged 12 and above who have haemophilia A or B with inhibitors.

news.headline: Focus on Amina and Salma's trip in Hubei Village, Tacheng Township, Nanchang County, as they experience Chinese rural life.
news.summary: In Nanchang, China on October 18, 2024, a report by the Jiangxi International Communication Center (JXICC) highlights the exploration of Chinese rural villages through the experiences of two international students, Amina and Salma. They visited Hubei Village in Tacheng Township, Nanchang County to gain insights into rural life. This initiative sought to challenge preconceived notions about rural China and shed light on the everyday realities of these communities. The students' journey provided a unique perspective on the village's culture, lifestyle, and local traditions. It aimed to showcase the diversity and essence of rural Chinese villages, inviting a deeper understanding of their way of life.

news.headline: Korean and Spanish content lead non-English viewing on Netflix, capturing 16% global viewing, with Korean shows at 8.71%.
news.summary: In a recent analysis by Omdia of 'What We Watched: A Netflix Engagement Report' for the first half of 2024, Korean and Spanish series have gained significant popularity among global viewers on Netflix. Korean content has surged ahead, representing 8.71% of the total non-English language content watched on the platform. This marks a notable rise in audience engagement with non-English language shows, with Spanish series also proving to be a key contender in capturing the interest of viewers worldwide. The data highlights a growing trend towards embracing diverse international content on streaming services.

news.headline: Huawei eKit launches over 30 new products and upgrades solutions to boost distribution business.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 18, 2024, the HUAWEI eKit Forum took place as part of GITEX GLOBAL 2024. The forum focused on the theme "Together for Growth, Digitalization for Success." Huawei presented a range of accomplishments achieved through a comprehensive strategic investment approach, including developments in research and development, marketing, and other areas.

news.headline: Hedge fund billionaire Daniel Loeb bets on Trump win, increases positions in certain sectors, citing positive impact.
news.summary: Billionaire investor Daniel Loeb, CEO of hedge fund Third Point, has positioned his portfolio in favor of a potential Republican victory in the upcoming US presidential election. He believes that a Trump win will benefit certain sectors and the overall market. Loeb predicts that the "America First" tariffs will boost domestic manufacturing, infrastructure spending, and commodity prices. He also expects a reduction in regulation and a wave of corporate activity under a Republican administration. Consequently, Third Point has increased positions that could benefit from these outcomes while moving away from companies not aligned with their expectations. This strategy follows similar moves made by former hedge fund manager Stanley Druckenmiller.

news.headline: Some ECB governors at this week's meeting wanted to drop pledge to keep policy tight - Sources.
City microbes are evolving to resist cleaners; novel strains found in Hong Kong. Research in Suzhou uncovers survival on disinfectants.
news.summary: Recent research has revealed that microbes are adapting to become resistant to cleaning agents designed to eradicate them. This study has identified unique strains existing in Hong Kong which were previously exclusive to the Antarctic desert soil. The findings were reported from Suzhou, China, on October 18, 2024. These discoveries are significant in light of the global health crisis experienced, prompting a reevaluation of our reliance on traditional cleaning methods.

news.headline: CUHK-Shenzhen reflects on 10 years of success, comparing itself to top schools; rapidly emerges as educational leader.
news.summary: In a recent report by China Daily, it was revealed that The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen, celebrating its 10th anniversary, has emerged as a prominent player in the education sector. The university is now benchmarking itself against the world's top-rated schools, showcasing remarkable progress. This significant growth has positioned the institution as a key educational entity in China. With a strong focus on quality education and innovation, the university has quickly established itself as a leading force.  As it continues to expand and evolve, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen is making waves in the international academic arena.

news.headline: City of London under scrutiny for lack of progress towards racial equality. #diversity #inclusion
Vantage Markets marks 15th anniversary with $111,000 prizes in Vantage First Class Promo. Celebrates successful trading.
news.summary: Today in Port Vila, Vanuatu, Vantage Markets introduced the Vantage First Class Promo, commemorating 15 years of prosperous trading with traders in specific areas. This exclusive event highlights the company's milestone, offering a special promotion to selected regions as a token of appreciation.

news.headline: Dogecoin surged 9% in 24 hours, with weekly gains of 24% and monthly gains of 32%. Traders speculate on sustainability.
news.summary: This week, Dogecoin (DOGE) experienced a significant rally, increasing over 9% in the last 24 hours. The surge was largely driven by Elon Musk, a major supporter of the "King of memes coins," who promoted the idea of a Department of Government Efficiency, nicknamed "DOGE," during his advocacy for former President Donald Trump. This recent increase has resulted in Dogecoin's weekly gains surpassing 24% and monthly gains reaching 32%. Renowned cryptocurrency trader Bluntz noted that Dogecoin typically shows its strongest performance towards the end of a cycle, following all-time highs for Bitcoin (BTC). Despite the emergence of new memes, the trader emphasized that dismissing Dogecoin as obsolete would be a significant error, highlighting its impressive growth potential from its lows to a 30x increase in just a few weeks. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Criticism of cringeworthy LinkedIn posts triples on popular Subreddit.
Consumers easily influenced by the 'Health Halo' effect at grocery stores, impacting food choices and spending trends.
news.summary: The concept revolves around the belief that a food item is beneficial to our health due to a single statement, influencing our eating habits and financial decisions.

news.headline: Company's ownership changes: total holding(s) altered.
"111, Inc. to reveal Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 28, 2024. Conference call to follow. (NASDAQ: YI)"
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, in Shanghai, 111, Inc. ("111" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: YI) revealed their commitment to transforming the healthcare industry in China through digital empowerment. The company, a top tech-enabled healthcare platform, strives to reshape the industry's value chain by empowering both upstream and downstream sectors.

news.headline: Eruditus raises $150M in Series F funding led by TPG's The Rise Fund, with participation from Softbank Vision Fund 2 and others for AI products and enterprise growth.
news.summary: Eruditus, the parent company of Emeritus, has successfully completed a funding round with support from current investors Softbank Vision Fund 2, Leeds Illuminate, Accel, CPP Investments, and the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative. The funding will be used to further develop AI products and facilitate the expansion of the enterprise business. This move is expected to boost growth and enhance investment opportunities.

news.headline: XTrend sponsors DQ Foundation's 16th Charity Walk in Cyprus, aiming to raise funds and promote social causes.
news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus on October 18, 2024, XTrend, a prominent company in online trading solutions, revealed its position as the Gold Sponsor for the 16th Annual Charity Walk organized by the Dancing Queen Foundation (DQ Foundation). This event is focused on fundraising and advocating for social causes.

news.headline: AI technology causing growth in AWS ecosystem in Germany due to increased data volume. - ISG report.
news.summary: The demand for data management and analysis services is on the rise in Germany, leading organizations to seek assistance from providers within the AWS ecosystem, as reported by ISG. This surge is attributed to the increasing volume of data that needs to be handled efficiently.

news.headline: MiR launches MiR Fleet Enterprise software for AMRs, boosts productivity and secures internal logistics.
news.summary: In ODENSE, Denmark, autonomous mobile robot (AMR) leader Mobile Industrial Robots (MiR) introduced MiR Fleet Enterprise, an innovative fleet management software platform. This new software aims to enhance material handling workflows for increased productivity. With MiR Fleet Enterprise, MiR further establishes itself as a comprehensive solution provider for internal logistics and material handling. By offering scalable, flexible, and secure software, MiR continues its commitment to delivering top-quality solutions.
